name: WW Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Buttermilk Biscuits, Refrigerated (10 biscuits in "tube")
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray an 8x8x2 inch baking pan and set aside.
3. Separate biscuits and flatten each into a 3-inch circle using your fingers.
4. Brush each circle with an equal amount of margarine.
5. Sprinkle each circle with an equal amount of brown sugar and cinnamon, then top each with raisins.
6. Roll each circle in a jelly-roll fashion and arrange in two rows, seam side down, in the sprayed pan.
7. Bake until rolls are puffed and golden brown, 8-12 minutes.
8. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let rolls cool in the pan.
9. In a small bowl or cup, combine the remaining 2.5 teaspoons brown sugar and powdered sugar, adding water one teaspoon at a time, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and syrupy.
10. Remove rolls to a serving platter and brush each with an equal amount of sugar mixture.
